name: launch-support-v1
description: Representative internal support questions used to evaluate groundedness, citation correctness, retrieval relevance, and refusal behavior before launch.

scenarios.question: How do I resolve error SL-429?
scenarios.source_text: Error SL-429 means the tenant has exceeded support rate limits. Resolve it by checking usage and retrying after the backoff window.

scenarios.question: Why are password reset emails failing?
scenarios.source_text: Password reset errors require verifying the identity provider status page before retrying the reset flow.

scenarios.question: What happens when citation validation fails?
scenarios.source_text: Citation failures must return a safe refusal instead of unsupported generation.

scenarios.question: What is the refund policy for enterprise contracts?
How do I reset it?
scenarios.source_text: Password reset errors require verifying the identity provider status page before retrying the reset flow.
